name: Hunter.io API
what_it_does: Email finder and verification API for finding professional email addresses by domain or name, with email validation and deliverability checking.
use_cases: Finding professional email addresses for outreach agents
Verifying email deliverability before sending campaigns
Discovering all emails at a domain for company mapping
Enriching contact records with verified email addresses
Building lead lists from company domains
not_for: Phone number or social media enrichment
Jurisdictions with strict data privacy laws that restrict email finding
best_when: You need to find and verify professional email addresses for B2B outreach or lead enrichment in agent workflows.
avoid_when: You operate in GDPR-strict environments where finding emails without consent may violate regulations, or need non-email contact data.

auth.notes: API key as query parameter (api_key). Simple key-based access with no scopes.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 25 searches and 50 verifications per month
pricing.notes: Free tier is suitable for light testing. Monthly search quota resets. Unused searches roll over on paid plans.

performance.rate_limits: No documented per-minute limit; monthly search quota applies

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clear JSON errors with errors array containing id and details. Well-documented error codes.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only API - all lookups are naturally idempotent and don't consume quota on cache hits.
known_agent_gotchas: Monthly quota resets on billing date, not calendar month - track usage carefully
Domain Search returns up to 100 results per call - pagination required for large companies
Email verification results include disposable/accept-all flags that agents should check before use
GDPR considerations: finding emails of EU individuals may require legal basis
Confidence scores below 75 indicate uncertain matches - agents should threshold these
